title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: fapolicyd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for fapolicyd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: fapolicyd.service badly instructs how to start after nss-user-lookup.target
fapolicyd fails to start in image mode

full_text:
An update for fapolicyd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
